policy: Single canonical runtime package. Duplicated source lists are merged into consolidated registries. Positive phrase/collocation resources are support/LRET KEEP only; absence is never an error.

runtime_roles.lexical_registry: single source for valid words, CEFR, register, academic signal, frequency, spelling veto, and LRET word metadata
runtime_roles.discourse_registry: single source for discourse markers/functions; replaces discourse_markers.txt at runtime
runtime_roles.noun_governance_registry: single source for countability/mass/collective noun support; replaces mass_abstract_nouns.txt and collective_singular.txt at runtime
runtime_roles.positive_collocations_registry: single source for collocation/phrase positive evidence and LRET KEEP; merges OCD positive TSVs, ACL, phrase list, and legacy pairs
runtime_roles.preposition_governance_registry: single source for governed preposition support; requires dependency/governor validation before charge
runtime_roles.verb_complement_registry: single source for verb complement support; requires observed complement mismatch before charge

conflict_rules.pos_conflicts: explicit POS union retained; unknown loses to explicit POS

ignored_runtime_sources: raw UniMorph/VerbNet research dumps already represented in consolidated TSV/JSON
old separate text lists after merge
